C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. IN DEPT. 503A. NANCY DAVIS, PRO TEM. D. CARTER, CLERK. MARIA TORREANO, CSR. CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE WITH RESPECT TO JOYCE KAMAU. DEFT. FARAJI KAMAU DID NOT APPEAR; CASE REMOVED FROM JURY TRIAL CALENDAR AND TO COURT TRIAL ON 3/13/00.
TRIAL ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 218

C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT IN DEPT 218, LNORRIS, JUDGE; FHENTON, CLERK; LGRANGER, CSR. PLNTF APPR BY SLITTMAN, ESQ, NO APPR OF DEF FARAJI KAMAU. WITNESS SWORN AND EXAMINED. DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE INTRODUCED. COURT AWARDS DEFAULT JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLNTF KIRIT B. PATEL AND AGAINST DEF FARAJI KAMAU FOR IMMEDIATE POSSESSION OF PREMISES AT 474 VALENCIA STREET #322, SAN FRANCISCO, CA TOGETHER WITH DAMAGES OF $1928.66. ORAL AGREEMENT WHEREBY DEFENDANT HELD POSSESSION IS FORFEITED.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: LITTMAN, STEVEN EDWARD SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR PATEL, KIRIT B.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KAMAU, FARAJI THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 447 VALENCIA STREET #322, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $1,928.66 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,928.66, LEASE FORFEITED
